    • Amazing Navy Blue Color Embroidered Attractive Party Wear silk Dulhan Lehenga choli

      Amazing Navy Blue Color Embroidered Attractive Party Wear silk Dulhan Lehenga choli

      Regular price $2,499.00
      Regular price $4,999.00 Sale price $2,499.00
      Unit price /  per 

      This amazing Navy Blue Color Lehenga choli is designed with resplendent Indian Embroidered art. This Enticing Cut also known as Ghagra choli, is suitable for all Occasion such as Wedding/bridal ceremony, Haldi ceremony, Sangeet ceremony, or any family function. You will mesmerize everyone and make their head turn any where you go. This Lehenga Choli is made from premium grade Malay satin fabrics and yarn and can be stitched to your style and body measurements.

      Lehenga Features:

      • Lehenga Fabric:- Malay satin silk
      • Dupatta Fabric:- Heavy Butterfly Net 5mm Work, Fancy Border Less Work (dupatta size 2.40 meter)
      • Blouse Fabric :- Malay satin silk
      • Lehenga Inner :-Micro Silk
      • Color :- Navy Blue
      • Blouse Work:-Sequence 5mm, Multi Niddle Work, Cording Work, Embroidery Work.
      • Lehenga Work :-Sequence 5mm, Multi Niddle Work, Cording Work, Embroidery Work.
      • Type : Lehenga :-Semi Stitched, Blouse:-Unstitched
      • Style Type :-Dulhan Lehenga , Bridal Lehenga, Marriage Special, Party Wear, Traditional, Wedding,Festival
      • Weight:-1.30 kg
      • Size:-Free Size,Lehenga: Length-42" Inches Width-up To 42 to 44" Flair bottom-up to 3.30 Mtr.

      Caring : Use dry clean only. Cold wash is recommended

      Note: Please note that if the dress can accommodate the design you are looking for without affecting the original design but you will have to try out various sleeve styles to find the right fashion fit for you.

      The colors of the actual piece may vary slightly or may not vary at all, from what you see on your device screen. This may be because of screen resolution or brightness setting. You will mesmerize everyone and make their head turn any where you go. This Lehenga Choli is made from premium grade Malay satin fabrics and yarn and can be stitched to your style and body measurements.

      Lehenga Features:

      • Lehenga Fabric:- Malay satin silk
      • Dupatta Fabric:- Heavy Butterfly Net 5mm Work, Fancy Border Less Work (dupatta size 2.40 meter)
      • Blouse Fabric :- Malay satin silk
      • Lehenga Inner :-Micro Silk
      • Color :- Aqua blue
      • Blouse Work:-Sequence 5mm, Multi Niddle Work, Cording Work, Embroidery Work.
      • Lehenga Work :-Sequence 5mm, Multi Niddle Work, Cording Work, Embroidery Work.
      • Type : Lehenga :-Semi Stitched, Blouse:-Unstitched
      • Style Type :-Dulhan Lehenga , Bridal Lehenga, Marriage Special, Party Wear, Traditional, Wedding,Festival
      • Weight:-1.30 kg
      • Size:-Free Size,Lehenga: Length-42" Inches Width-up To 42 to 44" Flair bottom-up to 3.30 Mtr.

      Caring : Use dry clean only. Cold wash is recommended

      Note: Please note that if the dress can accommodate the design you are looking for without affecting the original design but you will have to try out various sleeve styles to find the right fashion fit for you.

      The colors of the actual piece may vary slightly or may not vary at all, from what you see on your device screen. This may be because of screen resolution or brightness setting. The image shown is shot from the master piece and we always ensure to send you the exact shown product with the same workmanship and prints/arts.

      Accessories shown in the image are for presentation purpose only and length may vary slightly.
